etymology.description: Depicts a spindle -> original form of 專(專) (zhuān, "focused") and 惠(惠) (huì, "kindness")
etymology.interpretation: The character 叀 originally depicted a spindle, which later evolved into characters like 專(專) (zhuān, "focused") and 惠(惠) (huì, "kindness"), highlighting changes in both form and usage over time.
